channel.title: Linguistics Vanguard
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Linguistics Vanguard

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Annah Kariuki, Hannah Gibson, Tom Jelpke, Merceline Ochieng, Teresa Poeta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2024-frontmatters4

item.title: New perspectives on morphosyntactic variation in African youth language practices
item.description: Article by Annah Kariuki, Hannah Gibson, Tom Jelpke, Merceline Ochieng, Teresa Poeta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2024-0113

item.title: Theoretical considerations on linguistic innovation through new combinations in African youth language practices, exemplified in Yanké and Langila (DR Congo)
item.description: Article by Annah Kariuki, Hannah Gibson, Tom Jelpke, Merceline Ochieng, Teresa Poeta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2022-0146

item.title: The use of the narrative final vowel -á by the Lingala-speaking youth of Kinshasa: from anterior to near/recent past
item.description: Article by Annah Kariuki, Hannah Gibson, Tom Jelpke, Merceline Ochieng, Teresa Poeta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2022-0144

item.title: On the development of tense-aspect markers in Lingala youth language: a microvariationist look at language change in the verb phrase
item.description: Article by Annah Kariuki, Hannah Gibson, Tom Jelpke, Merceline Ochieng, Teresa Poeta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2023-0019

item.title: Innovative use of Shona ideophones within an adolescent community of practice
item.description: Article by Annah Kariuki, Hannah Gibson, Tom Jelpke, Merceline Ochieng, Teresa Poeta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2022-0136

item.title: Encoding politeness in African urban youth languages: evidence from Southern Africa
item.description: Article by Annah Kariuki, Hannah Gibson, Tom Jelpke, Merceline Ochieng, Teresa Poeta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2022-0147

item.title: Noun classes, variation, and creativity in youth language practices in Zimbabwe and Tanzania
item.description: Article by Annah Kariuki, Hannah Gibson, Tom Jelpke, Merceline Ochieng, Teresa Poeta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2022-0157

item.title: Linguistic variation in urban vernaculars and rural and urban youth language in South Africa
item.description: Article by Annah Kariuki, Hannah Gibson, Tom Jelpke, Merceline Ochieng, Teresa Poeta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2022-0154

item.title: Verbal extensions in Sheng: an examination of variation in form and function
item.description: Article by Annah Kariuki, Hannah Gibson, Tom Jelpke, Merceline Ochieng, Teresa Poeta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingvan-2022-0149
